title: Preserve Agent Plugin Lifecycle Dependency Direction
forbids: service imports of concrete resource providers or controller implementation, and CLI imports of lifecycle service internals
why: The service owns lifecycle semantics behind resource contracts. Concrete providers and controller composition stay at the CLI edge, which consumes only declared lifecycle package exports.
remediate: Depend on a resource contract from the service, bind its provider at the CLI edge, and import lifecycle behavior through a declared public package subpath.
message: Lifecycle dependencies must point from controller composition through public service ports to resource contracts.
